content: I marinai russi tirarono fuori il povero ragazzo dall'acqua gelata, lo riscaldarono e gli diedero da bere della vodka.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by Guybrush88 (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: eng:Russian sailors pulled the poor guy out of the frozen water, warmed him up, and gave him some vodka to drink
